publicPurpose: Audience-facing brand house map for Lux Veritas public routes.
headline: One house. Many rooms.
summary: The public Lux Veritas world is organized as a living media house: records, studios, publishing, live rooms, community, and selected drops moving together without flattening the work.

houseMarks.title: Lux Veritas Records
houseMarks.body: Release rooms, artist worlds, sessions, radio signals, and long-form music culture.

houseMarks.title: Lux Veritas Studios
houseMarks.body: Cinematic chapters, visual worlds, screenings, and filmed atmosphere.

houseMarks.title: Lux Veritas Publishing
houseMarks.body: Outer Codex essays, story language, print signals, and selected written works.

houseMarks.title: Lux Veritas Live
houseMarks.body: Listening rooms, salons, private screenings, and destination cultural gatherings.

houseMarks.title: Lux Circle
houseMarks.body: First access, private drops, presales, behind-the-scenes releases, and member paths.

houseMarks.title: Lux Atelier
houseMarks.body: Editions, merch, objects, and owned commerce for supporters.
